creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #9)

One implication of the need to use a __MAKE_CONF
file with material that is really SRCCONF or
SRC_ENV_CONF only content is for poudriere:
building jails and bulk builds would need
somewhat differing *make.conf file content
overall.

So the jail (system) specific content must be
disabled for bulk builds but enabled for jail
builds when there are sys.mk ?= usage
conflicts that matter.
